title: Modern Luxury Villa with Ocean View
description: Stunning contemporary villa perched on a hillside offering breathtaking panoramic ocean views. This architectural masterpiece features floor-to-ceiling windows, an infinity pool, and an open-concept design that seamlessly blends indoor and outdoor living. The gourmet kitchen is equipped with top-of-the-line appliances, while the master suite boasts a private terrace and spa-like bathroom.

title: Downtown Penthouse Loft
description: Experience urban luxury at its finest in this spectacular penthouse loft located in the heart of downtown. Soaring 20-foot ceilings, exposed brick walls, and massive industrial windows flood the space with natural light. The rooftop terrace offers stunning city skyline views, perfect for entertaining. Smart home technology throughout ensures modern convenience.

title: Charming Craftsman Bungalow
description: Beautifully restored Craftsman bungalow that perfectly marries historic charm with modern updates. Original hardwood floors, built-in cabinetry, and a stone fireplace create a warm, inviting atmosphere. The updated kitchen features quartz countertops and a farmhouse sink. The backyard includes a detached studio perfect for a home office.

title: Waterfront Estate with Private Dock
description: Exceptional waterfront property offering a rare combination of luxury living and direct water access. The estate features a private dock, heated pool, and expansive grounds. Inside, you'll find gourmet kitchen, home theater, wine cellar, and a grand living room with a two-story fireplace. The master wing includes a sitting room and private balcony overlooking the water.

title: Sleek Studio Apartment in Arts District
description: Ultra-modern studio apartment in the vibrant Arts District. This thoughtfully designed space features custom built-ins, a Murphy bed system, and a chef's kitchen with premium appliances. Floor-to-ceiling windows provide abundant natural light and views of the neighborhood murals. Building amenities include rooftop pool, fitness center, and co-working space.

title: Mountain Retreat with Panoramic Views
description: Escape to this stunning mountain retreat surrounded by nature yet just minutes from town. The A-frame design features dramatic vaulted ceilings, a wall of windows showcasing forest views, and a massive stone fireplace. The wrap-around deck is ideal for morning coffee or stargazing. Includes a separate guest house and three-car garage.

title: Beautiful Test Property
description: A wonderful test property with amazing views
